title: isatis tinctoria subsp. hirsuta
intro: Isatis tinctoria subsp. hirsuta, commonly known as hairy woad or hirsute woad, is a subspecies of the Isatis tinctoria plant, a member of the Brassicaceae family. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Isatis tinctoria subsp. hirsuta include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, such as bronchitis and pneumonia. Isatis tinctoria subsp. hirsuta can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies and supplements.
